notes:
Tried all proton versions (barring GE ones), and all of them try to install the MS runtime. Appears to be a semi recent update causing the issue, not seen it addressed anywhere besides reddit. Refunded the gift, mores the pity.
Be nice if the game at least had beta versions of older builds, to test if nothing else.
